login.login_rate_limited: Too many login attempts, please try again later

live_sources.title: Live Sources
live_sources.content_placeholder:
Paste content, system auto-detects format:
[M3U]
#EXTM3U
#EXTINF:-1,CCTV1
http://...

[TXT]
CCTV,#genre#
CCTV1,http://...
live_sources.client_ip_placeholder: Enter IP or network interface name (e.g. eth0, eth1.50)
live_sources.client_ip_help: Enter an IP address or a system network interface name (the program will auto-detect the IP)
live_sources.auth_params_placeholder: JSON format for ValidAuthenticationHW API parameters
live_sources.auth_params_help: Enter parameters for ValidAuthenticationHW{suffix}.jsp API (JSON format).
live_sources.scheduled_detect_help: Uses ffprobe to periodically detect channel latency, codec and resolution. Upload ffprobe in Settings first.
live_sources.detect_strategy_help: Unicast first: prefer unicast URLs, fallback to unicast catchup; Multicast first: prefer multicast URLs, fallback to unicast
live_sources.epg_strategy_help: Select "Auto Detect" to try all strategies in order, auto-save on success
live_sources.auto_create_epg_help: If content is M3U with x-tvg-url attribute, a network XMLTV EPG source will be auto-created
live_sources.required_ip: Please enter client IP or interface name
live_sources.invalid_auth_json: Auth parameters JSON format is invalid
live_sources.delete_confirm: Delete live source "{name}"? Associated EPG sources and channel data will also be deleted.
live_sources.crack_auth_placeholder: Paste the Authenticator value from packet capture (hex string)

epg_sources.title: EPG Sources
epg_sources.no_unlinked: No available unlinked IPTV live sources
epg_sources.required_live_source: Please select a linked IPTV live source
epg_sources.delete_confirm: Delete EPG source "{name}"? Associated program data will be cleared.
epg_sources.select_unlinked: Select an unlinked IPTV live source
epg_sources.only_unlinked: Only shows IPTV live sources not yet linked to an EPG source
epg_sources.epg_strategy_help: Select "Auto Detect" to try all strategies in order, auto-save on success

rules.title: Aggregation Rules
rules.alias_help: Set channel aliases. Rules are matched in order, the first match takes effect. In regex mode, use ${'{'}1{'}'}, ${'{'}2{'}'} to reference capture groups (braces are required). Example: ${'{'}1{'}'}${'{'}2{'}'}Test
rules.filter_help: Filter out unwanted channels or programs. Rules are matched in order, matched items are discarded.
rules.group_help: Channel grouping (live only). Matched top to bottom, assigned to specified group on match.
rules.match_content_placeholder: Enter pattern to match (regex or string)
rules.config_empty: Please add at least one valid rule configuration
rules.ai_select_sources_desc: Select live sources for AI analysis. The system will extract channel names to generate grouping rules.
rules.ai_no_sources: No live sources available. Please add a live source and sync channel data first.
rules.ai_no_channels: No channel data found in selected sources. Please ensure channels have been synced.
rules.ai_prompt_copy_failed: Copy failed, please copy manually from below
rules.ai_prompt_instruction: Paste the content below into an AI assistant (ChatGPT, Gemini, Qwen, DeepSeek, etc.), then copy back the complete JSON response.
rules.ai_paste_placeholder: Paste the JSON response from AI here...
rules.ai_parse_error: Invalid JSON format. Please check that the AI response is a valid group rules JSON array.
rules.ai_parse_empty: Please paste the JSON response from AI
rules.ai_channel_count: {count} channel names will be used for AI analysis

publish.title: Publish
publish.filter_invalid_help: When enabled, automatically filters out timed-out invalid channels during aggregation
publish.tvg_id_help: Determines the "tvg-id" in M3U or "channel id" in XMLTV. Third-party players rely on this ID for logo and program matching.
publish.catchup_placeholder: Optional, fill in catchup template parameters if needed
publish.select_source_first: Please select at least one source first
publish.address_type_help: Live address extraction strategy. Multicast first: prefer IGMP, degrade to unicast; Unicast first: prefer unicast, fallback to timeshift.
publish.source_required: Please select at least one source
publish.udpxy_help: Compatible with udpxy, msd_lite, rtp2httpd and other multicast-to-unicast proxy services
publish.fcc_enable_help: Requires rtp2httpd proxy service. When enabled, FCC parameters will be auto-appended for channels that support it
publish.ua_check_help: When enabled, only requests with matching User-Agent are allowed
publish.ua_allowed_placeholder: One User-Agent per line, supports partial matching

settings_detect.title: Detection Settings
settings_detect.upload_help: Upload the ffprobe executable. The system will automatically verify the file.
settings_detect.ffmpeg_download_prefix: ffprobe is included in the FFmpeg package. Download from

settings_access_control.title: Access Control
settings_access_control.mode_disabled_desc: No access restrictions, all IPs can access the system
settings_access_control.mode_whitelist_desc: Only IPs in the whitelist can access the system
settings_access_control.mode_blacklist_desc: IPs in the blacklist are blocked from accessing the system
settings_access_control.invalid_range: Invalid IP range format, please check both start and end addresses
settings_access_control.access_stats_desc: IP access information from the last 7 days
settings_access_control.access_location_tip: Location is resolved via GeoIP database. Please download the GeoIP database first.
settings_access_control.geoip_downloading_tip: File is being downloaded, please wait

settings_about.title: About
settings_about.sponsor_desc: If you find this project helpful, consider sponsoring the developer. Thank you for your generosity!
settings_about.already_latest: You are using the latest version
settings_about.check_failed: Failed to check for updates, please check your network
settings_about.star_desc: IPTV Tool is an open-source project. If you find it helpful, please give us a Star ⭐ on GitHub — it's the best encouragement for us!
